vocab.meaning: cực kỳ hạnh phúc, sung sướng
vocab.example: I was absolutely over the moon when my parents surprised me with a high-end smartwatch for my graduation.

vocab.meaning: cực kỳ sang trọng, chất lượng cao
vocab.example: The gold-plated watch I received on my wedding day was truly fit for a king.

vocab.meaning: giúp ai đó luôn cảnh giác và sẵn sàng (đúng giờ)
vocab.example: This watch was a gift from my mentor to keep me on my toes regarding my strict daily schedule.

vocab.meaning: rất hữu ích, có giá trị lớn
vocab.example: That waterproof watch my brother gave me proved to be worth its weight in gold during my hiking trip.

vocab.meaning: niềm vui nhân đôi, điều may mắn thêm vào
vocab.example: I won the award, and receiving a designer watch as a bonus was just the icing on the cake.

vocab.meaning: có ý nghĩa vô cùng lớn lao với ai đó
vocab.example: This simple digital watch means the world to me because it was a gift from my little sister's first paycheck.

vocab.meaning: khiến ai đó vô cùng ngạc nhiên và ấn tượng
vocab.example: The intricate design of the pocket watch I got as a gift completely blew me away.

vocab.meaning: bền bỉ, không bị lỗi mốt qua thời gian
vocab.example: My father gave me his old watch, and its classic look has really stood the test of time.

vocab.meaning: vượt qua mọi thăng trầm, khó khăn
vocab.example: I’ve worn the watch my best friend gave me through thick and thin for the last five years.

vocab.meaning: thu hút sự chú ý của ai đó
vocab.example: The sapphire blue dial of the watch I received as a birthday gift immediately caught my eye.
